name: codex-rate-watcher
title: Codex Rate Watcher
description: Monitor your Codex CLI usage quotas directly from Raycast
author: patchwork-body

commands.name: status
commands.title: Codex Usage Status
commands.subtitle: View current quota usage
commands.description: Shows current Codex CLI usage across all quota windows

commands.name: profiles
commands.title: Codex Profiles
commands.subtitle: Manage auth profiles
commands.description: List and view all saved Codex authentication profiles

commands.name: history
commands.title: Codex Usage History
commands.subtitle: View usage trends
commands.description: Shows usage history with sparkline visualization
